arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah comments on Liverpool contract dispute send ripples through Barcelona
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah sent shockwaves running through Merseyside this week when he announced that he was closer to leaving Liverpool than staying at Anfield. The tremors have been felt as far away as Barcelona. The Egyptian is out of contract next summer, and earning close to €22m pe year, with the Reds seemingly reluctant commit star […] The post Mohamed Salah comments on Liverpool contract dispute send ripples through Barcelona appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Brest tactics board revealed ahead of Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Other notes written on the board tell Brest to: “manage the ball in possession” and “press high to force Barcelona wide in order to disconnect Lewandowski and manage depth.” El Chiringuito spotted the club’s tactics board during training which seems to have revealed the team’s line-up and some plans for taking on Barca.

arts.ttl: El Clasico Legends squads: Barcelona and Real Madrid teams ahead of huge exhibition match in Qatar
arts.sum: Eternal rivals meet in Doha for third legends match

Just a day to go before the Champions League returns to the Estadi Olímpic Lluís Companys with FC Barcelona facing French club Brest on match day five of the initial league phase of the competition. The visitors are the surprise package of the season in Europe and are a point head of the blaugranes in the table, and Barça coach Hansi Flick is aware of the test facing his players on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Lopez and Szczęsny joke about Mingueza during Barca vs Celta
arts.sum: “Well, thanks to him,” said Szczesny which brought a laugh from his team-mate. Mingueza probably had the last laugh as Celta came from two goals down to draw.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Stade Brestois: UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Barcelon hosts Brest in the UEFA Champions League looking to end a two game winless streak.

arts.sum: The game between Barcelona vs Las Palmas will be played on Sunday November 30, at Estadi de Montjuïc with kick off at 8:00 a.m. ET / 5:00 a.m. PT . Form guide for Barcelona vs Las Palmas

arts.ttl: Brest boss wary of facing ‘wounded animal’ Barca
arts.sum: The French side are unbeaten in the Champions League so far which Roy says has taken all the pressure off his players ahead of their trip to Montjuic. Brest boss Eric Roy has previewed his team’s Champions League clash against Barcelona and says his team have nothing to lose.
